title: Straame Playballs, Crush-Proof, Colourful Pit Balls for Kids Baby-Approved Multi-Pack Toddler Ball Pit, Smooth Plastic Balls, No Sharp Edges, Non-Toxic & BPA Free.
features: Baby-Safe Design: Crafted with your child's safety in mind, our playballs feature a diameter specially designed for toddlers, ensuring safe play at every stage of development. Bright, multi-coloured balls offer visually stimulating fun without compromising safety. Crush-resistant design ensures durability for long-lasting playtime adventures.

Interactive Play: Experience creativity and development with Straame Playballs! These small, colourful plastic balls stimulate sensory exploration and are effortlessly cleaned. From pool to playmat, they inspire imaginative play. Encourage teamwork and communication as kids engage in interactive fun. Plus, they aid sensory integration and promote learning through hands-on exploration. From tactile stimulation to hand-eye coordination. Inspire curiosity and exploration with our playballs, learning activities, experimenting with gravity, and exploring concepts of volume and measurement.

Safety Certified: Straame colourful play ball are free from choking hazards, sharp edges, and other potential risks. Our playballs are made from premium, non-toxic materials, free from phthalates, BPA, and other harmful substances. With a 5.5cm diameter, they are perfectly sized for little hands to grasp securely, reducing the risk of ingestion. Let your child play with confidence and peace of mind.

Indoor and Outdoor Fun: Whether it's a rainy day indoors or a sunny day outdoors, our playballs provide endless entertainment for children of all ages, promoting active play and social interaction in any setting. Encourage learning through play with our colourful playballs, which can be used for counting, sorting, colour recognition, and other educational activities

Eye Catching vibrant colours: Choose from a variety of vibrant colour combinations to suit your child's preferences. Whether it's blue and white, pink and baby pink, or multi-coloured, our playballs offer endless entertainment, keeping kids engaged for hours of fun-filled play. Relax and unwind while your little ones immerse themselves in imaginative play.
